clusters.justification: These terms share neuroimaging co-activation within anterior limbic and salience pathways dedicated to processing emotional valence, visceral states, and generalized arousal.
These concepts map onto mesocorticolimbic circuitry responsible for computing subjective incentive, processing reinforcement, and driving goal-directed behavior.
These terms converge functionally across the default mode network, which integrates self-referential processing, autobiographical memory, and interpersonal inferences.
